title: MODULAR SOC AI/ML INFERENCE ENGINE WITH DYNAMIC UPDATES USING A CENTRAL COLLECTING AND CONSOLIDATED LAYER-TO-LAYER DATA TRANSFER TOPOLOGY AT EACH NEURAL NETWORK LAYER
summary:
An electronic circuit system implementing and executing machine learning inference engines.
While ML inference engines are based on (architectures and parameters defined by) configured, trained and tuned machine learning models, our design has the novel ability to support data driven, on-the-fly- reconfigured model runs. Reconfiguration and tuning operations include dynamic computational graph
modifications, define-by-run alterations, changes to network depth (number of layers) and width (neurons per layer), and adjustments to weights, biases, plus activation function parameters. Neuralnetworks supported include Feed-Forward, RNN, CNN, and Hopfield architectures SVG

 plus Ensemble,Federated, Cooperating, Adversarial, and Swarm collections SVG
19221862.05-29-2025.MESWQNAZX169X27.ABST.1.10.1505.1180.1530.1204.svg
0.08
0.083
Chemistry
Black and white

 Decision Trees and Forests are also supported, as are more esoteric approaches such as ART and KAN. Our invention is capable of running
both standalone and cooperatively, the cooperative processing being local and/or remote/cloud based, interfacing with telemetry applications to feed data, and machine learning software to feed new or
updated models SVG

CLAIM AMENDMENTS
This listing of claims will replace all prior versions, and listings, of claims in the application:

1.
 (Canceled).
Canceled

2
2. (Currently Amended) A digital circuit implementing a machine learning model inference engine for one or more models, the digital circuit comprising:a hub-and-spoke data transfer architecture for each of the one or more models,
wherein each of the one or more models comprises a neural network having an input layer, one or more intermediate layers, and an output layer,
wherein the input layer, the one or more intermediate layers, and the output layer are processed sequentially,
a plurality of neurons, said plurality of neurons comprising at least a first neuron set and a second neuron set,
wherein thea plurality of neurons of [[the]]a first neuron set are not directly connected to any of [[the]]a plurality of neurons of [[the]]a second neuron set;
a plurality of hub nodes comprising at least a first hub node and a second hub node,
wherein the plurality of neurons in the first neuron set are only connected to the first hub node,
wherein the plurality of neurons in the second neuron set are only connected to the second hub node;
wherein all data transfers between and among each of a first layer and a second layer take place hub-to-hub, such that the data transfers between the first layer and the second layer occur between the first hub node and the second hub node;

wherein the first hub provides the first set of neurons with data needed by the first set of neurons to perform respective computations within the neural network; and
wherein the second hub node provides the second set of neurons with data needed by the second set of neurons to perform respective computations within the neural network.
Currently amended

16. (Currently Amended) A digital circuit implementing a neural network inference engine comprising:
a plurality of layers of a neural network, said layers comprising at least a first input layer, one or more hidden layers, and a final output layer;
a plurality of neurons, said neurons comprising a first neuron set, a second neuron set, and one or more additional neuron sets,
wherein the first neuron set is in a first layer and the second neuron set is in a second layer; and
a plurality of hub nodes comprising at a first hub node, a second hub node, and one or more additional hub nodes,
wherein the first neuron set is not directly connected to any of the neurons in the second neuron set and is not directly connected to any of the neurons in the one or more additional neuron sets,
wherein the neurons in the first neuron set are only connected to the first hub node,
wherein neurons in the second neuron set are only connected to the second hub node;
wherein neurons in the one or more additional neuron sets are only connected to a corresponding hub node for each of the one or more additional hub nodes,

wherein all data transfers between and among the plurality of layers of the neural network take place hub-to-hub, such that data transfers between the first layer and the second layer occur between the first hub node and the second hub node, and data transfers between the second layer and [[the ]]one or more additional layers occur between the second hub node and the one or more additional hub nodes,
wherein the first hub node provides the first set of neurons all data needed by the first set of neurons to perform respective computations within the neural network,
wherein the second hub node provides the second set of neurons all data needed by the second set of neurons to perform respective computations within the neural network, and
wherein the one or more additional hub nodes provides the one or more additional sets neurons all data needed by the one or more additional set of neurons to perform respective computations within the neural network;
wherein each hub node comprises in-circuit digital components configured to implement a data collector, including one or more of directly-connected wires, directly connected groups of wires, shared local memory or local memory cache or caches, shared global memory or global memory cache or caches, shared data bus or buses, shared standalone register or registers, register or registers that are part of one or more CPUs that are standalone or shared between or among layers, store-and-forward circuits, streaming circuits, batching-and-forwarding circuits for fixed or variable batch sizes with a given batch size based on any one or more local or global or computed variable or variables value or values, and gating circuits configured to make decisions as to what data to forward based on any of the one or more local or global or computed variable or variables

value or values that together implement the hub as a consolidating data collector for obtaining data from each neuron individually and combining them or putting the data in a sequence, that does a hub-to-hub data transfer of the totality or any subset of the data from all neurons in the layer to the hub of the next layer, at each neural network layer, and wherein the hubs of all the layers of the plurality of lay
ers of the neural network may have different or similar hub typesmay independently be hubs of different or similar types across all layers.
Currently amended
